objectives: Explain core concepts in data science and how statistics supports data-driven decision-making
Identify common data types and summarize datasets using statistical measures
Apply basic statistical reasoning to interpret results and avoid common pitfalls
learning_path.title: Foundations of Data Science and Statistics

objectives: Use Python to load, inspect, and manipulate datasets
Write clear, reusable Python code for data tasks
Prepare data for downstream analysis
learning_path.title: Working with Data in Python

objectives: Clean and transform raw data into analysis-ready tables
Handle missing values, duplicates, and inconsistent formats
Create reliable data preparation workflows
learning_path.title: Data Wrangling with Pandas

objectives: Retrieve and filter data using Sql queries
Join tables to build analysis datasets
Aggregate data to produce summary tables for reporting
learning_path.title: Querying Data with Sql

objectives: Describe how data models structure information for analysis
Interpret relationships between entities and tables
Use data models to support consistent querying and reporting
learning_path.title: Data Models for Analytics

objectives: Explain the role of data engineering in delivering trustworthy datasets
Design a simple flow from raw data to curated data for analysis
Identify quality checks that prevent downstream issues
learning_path.title: Data Engineering Basics for Reliable Pipelines

objectives: Choose appropriate chart types for different analytical questions
Create clear visual encodings that reduce misinterpretation
Communicate insights effectively using data visualization
learning_path.title: Data Visualization Principles

objectives: Build a basic report using data visualisation software
Design consistent layouts and filters for exploration
Validate that visuals match underlying data summaries
learning_path.title: Using Data Visualisation Software for Reporting

objectives: Explain the goals and common approaches of data mining
Identify patterns and relationships worth investigating
Prepare datasets for pattern discovery workflows
learning_path.title: Data Mining for Pattern Discovery

objectives: Describe key Machine Learning problem types and workflows
Train baseline models and interpret high-level behavior
Recognize common sources of error and overfitting
learning_path.title: Machine Learning Fundamentals

objectives: Create and transform features to improve model performance
Prevent leakage by separating feature creation from target information
Document feature choices for reproducibility
learning_path.title: Feature Engineering for Better Models

objectives: Select evaluation approaches appropriate to the problem
Compare models using consistent validation procedures
Interpret results to decide whether a model is ready for use
learning_path.title: Model Evaluation & Validation

objectives: Identify ethical risks in data collection, analysis, and modeling
Apply data ethics principles to reduce harm and bias
Document decisions and tradeoffs for accountability
learning_path.title: Data Ethics in Practice

objectives: Organize datasets and metadata to support reuse and auditing
Define conventions for versioning and documentation
Establish practices that improve reproducibility across analyses
learning_path.title: Manage Research Data for Reproducibility

matched_occupation.description: Data scientists find and interpret rich data sources, manage large amounts of data, merge data sources, ensure consistency of data-sets, and create visualisations to aid in understanding data. They build mathematical models using data, present and communicate data insights and findings to specialists and scientists in their team and if required, to a non-expert audience, and recommend ways to apply the data.
matched_occupation.label: data scientist
